trades.market: Will CPI rise more than 0.4% in April 2026?
trades.catalyst: Expected cooling of inflation due to base effects and Fed policy tightening
trades.risk_notes: Unexpected geopolitical shocks or commodity spikes could drive inflation higher
trades.grounding_source: Cleveland Fed Inflation Nowcast and BLS historical trends

trades.market: Will real GDP increase by more than 1.5% in Q1 2026?
trades.catalyst: Slowing consumer spending and tightening credit conditions
trades.risk_notes: Potential fiscal stimulus or unexpected productivity gains could boost GDP
trades.grounding_source: Cleveland Fed GDP Nowcast and BEA historical data

trades.market: Will the Fed cut rates before 2027?
trades.catalyst: Persistent inflation pressures likely to delay rate cuts
trades.risk_notes: Unexpected economic slowdown could force earlier rate cuts
trades.grounding_source: CME FedWatch Tool and FOMC minutes

avoid.market: Will the high temp in Miami be 81-82°F on Apr 13, 2026?
avoid.reason: Insufficient grounding data for precise temperature prediction this far out

avoid.market: Ethereum price at Apr 13, 2026 at 5pm EDT?
avoid.reason: High volatility and lack of reliable long-term crypto price models

notes: Current macro environment suggests inflationary pressures persist with high CPI readings and hawkish Fed stance. GDP growth faces headwinds from tightening monetary policy, reducing likelihood of strong quarterly increases. Rate cut expectations are tempered by inflation concerns.
